data.title: Permascand and Magneto Special Anodes merged to form Elicron, aiming to enhance customer service in evolving markets.
data.description: In Stockholm on February 19, 2026, following the merger of Permascand and Magneto Special Anodes, the company is rebranding as Elicron. The name change signifies a commitment to enhancing customer operational excellence in changing markets. This transformation comes one year after the merger.

data.title: BE Semiconductor Industries N.V. reports Q4-25 revenue of €166.4M & net income of €42.8M, up 25.4% & 69.2%, respectively vs Q3-25. Orders reach €250.4M for Q4-25, up 43.3% vs Q3-25 & 105.4% vs Q4-24. FY-25 revenue hits €591.3M & net income €131.6M with orders at €685.0M, up 16.8% vs FY-24. Proposed dividend of €1.58 per share for 2025 with a 95% payout ratio.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of the fiscal year 2025, Company XYZ reported a revenue of €166.4 million, showing a 25.4% increase from the previous quarter. The net income for Q4-25 was €42.8 million, marking a significant 69.2% growth compared to Q3-25. Orders received in Q4-25 amounted to €250.4 million, reflecting a substantial 43.3% increase from the previous quarter and a notable 105.4% surge from Q4-24. For the entire fiscal year 2025, Company XYZ reported a total revenue of €591.3 million and a net income of €131.6 million. The total orders received in FY-25 were recorded at €685.0 million, indicating a 16.8% increase from the previous fiscal year. The company has proposed a dividend of €1.58 per share for the fiscal year 2025, aligning with a 95% payout ratio.

data.title: Global smart TV market reached USD 248B in 2025, projected to hit USD 271B in 2026 and grow to USD 825B by 2036 at a CAGR of 11.8%. China and India were noted as leading growth markets. 4K UHD TVs accounted for over 60% of shipments, while those with sizes over 55 inches drove premium revenue.
data.description: As of February 19, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, a report from Future Market Insights (FMI) revealed that the worldwide smart TV market had a worth of around USD 248.0 billion in the year 2025. The estimate for its value in 2026 is USD 271.0 billion, with a projected growth to USD 825.0 billion by 2036 at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.8%.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric announces organizational changes and executive officer appointments effective April 1, 2026.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) has revealed organizational and executive officer adjustments starting April 1, 2026, following a board resolution. The changes include the renaming of the Corporate Human Resources Group. Executive Officers (Associate) appointments are also set for the same date.

data.title: Nasdaq rises as tech stocks rebound, investor sentiment improves, but Greed Index remains in 'Fear' zone. Dow Jones gains over 100 points, with Cadence Design Systems Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS) jumping nearly 8% and Analog Devices Inc (NASDAQ: ADI) shares gaining around 2.6% after positive financial results. Tech stocks led by software names recover. Fear and Greed index eases but remains in 'Fear' zone.
data.description: According to the CNN Money Fear and Greed index, there was a slight decrease in fear levels, yet the index remained in the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. The Dow Jones index saw a rise of over 100 points during the day as investors absorbed the minutes from the Federal Reserve's recent policy meeting. Tech stocks saw a rebound led by a surge in struggling software companies. Notably, Cadence Design Systems Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS) spearheaded the tech sector's climb, soaring nearly 8% after exceeding fourth-quarter revenue expectations and projecting robust growth for 2026. Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI) also performed well, with shares increasing by approximately 2.6% following the company's strong first-quarter financial results and second-quarter EPS guidance surpassing estimates. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.
According to Renault CEO, a stable Nissan will create greater prospects for working together.

data.title: cBrain raises earnings forecast for 2026 to 20-25% EBT, up from 15-20% expectation.
data.description: cBrain has revised its projected earnings before tax (EBT) to fall between 20% and 25%, a notable increase from the initial estimate of 15% to 20%.

data.title: Technip Energies appoints Jesse Stanley as President, Technologies & Products, effective March 16, 2026, and updates Executive Committee. Paris: TE.
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS: TE) has recently appointed Jesse Stanley as the President of the Technologies & Products (T&P) Business Unit and a member of the Executive Committee, effective from March 16, 2026. This appointment marks a significant change within the company's leadership team. Stanley will be responsible for spearheading strategies related to technologies and products, bringing a fresh perspective to the role. The Executive Committee of Technip Energies has been restructured to accommodate this new appointment, signaling a shift in the company's direction.

data.title: Global launch of vivo V70: 50MP ZEISS Super Telephoto Cam, 4K 60 fps vid, AI Stage Mode, post-editing tools.
data.description: Shenzhen, China - On February 19, 2026, vivo unveiled the worldwide release of the vivo V70. This cutting-edge device boasts a 50 MP ZEISS Super Telephoto Camera, an exclusive AI Stage Mode, 4K video at 60 fps, and advanced AI-driven post-editing capabilities. With these impressive features, the V70 is designed as an ideal choice for capturing stage performances and more.

data.title: Walmart expected to report earnings of 73 cents/share on $190.43 billion revenue, while DoorDash warned of lower-than-expected earnings.
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up today, with focus on Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) expected to report earnings of 73 cents per share on revenue of $190.43 billion. Walmart's shares dropped 0.4% to $126.11 after hours. DoorDash Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) reported lower fourth-quarter earnings than anticipated. DoorDash forecasts first-quarter marketplace gross order value (GOV) between $31 billion to $31.8 billion. Get more details on Benzinga.com.
PM Modi highlights on Twitter that AI deepfakes and fake content are destabilizing, calling for clear source standards, watermarking, and child safety vigilance.

data.title: PIPPIN, a Solana-based memecoin, has surged 25% this year, outperforming Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) which have dropped 23% and 33% respectively.
data.description: In a year where major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) faced significant losses, a lesser-known token called PIPPIN, a Solana-based memecoin (PIPPIN), has shown remarkable growth, increasing by nearly 25% in 2026. This has positioned PIPPIN as the fifth most successful cryptocurrency despite the overall bearish trend in the market. In comparison, Bitcoin has fallen by 23% and Ethereum by 33% during the same period. This information, including more details, can be found on Benzinga.com.
Airbus not satisfied with 2026 shipment volumes from Pratt & Whitney, which are below previously agreed amounts, says CEO.
Inflation projected to stay within target in 2026 and 2027, says Indonesia’s C.B. governor.
